notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Protection Paladin gear guide (anchor phase-3-best-in-slot — Icy Veins numbers ToT as their Phase 3). Tier set: Reconstructed Furious Shoulderplates + tier pieces vary by boss per Icy Veins' reforge pick. Belt note: Icy Veins mislabels the Cloudbreaker Greatbelt's source raid as "Heart of Fear" on this page — Jin'rokh the Breaker is in fact Throne of Thunder's own first boss; corrected here. Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list — same items across MoP raid content.
